ddls:
CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine (e.g., server, workstation) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or network location of the machine */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organizational unit the machine belongs to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the machine */,
  "last_compliance_check" TEXT /* Date of the last compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status of the machine */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the machine's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy category (e.g., System, Network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent policy category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy subcategory (e.g., Audit Credential Validation) */,
  "subcategory_guid" TEXT /* GUID of the policy subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy subcategory */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subcategory is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the subcategory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_subcategories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES policy_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_subcategories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy setting */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy subcategory */,
  "inclusion_setting" TEXT /* Inclusion setting for the policy (e.g., Success and Failure) */,
  "exclusion_setting" TEXT /* Exclusion setting for the policy */,
  "setting_value" INTEGER /* Value of the policy setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the setting is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date from which the setting is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date when the setting expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_settings_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES policy_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_policy_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy assignment */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy setting */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was assigned to the machine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date from which the assignment is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date when the assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_policy_assignments_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES policy_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_policy_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_policy_assignments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_policy_assignments_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy assignment */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "next_compliance_check" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES machine_policy_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, IT staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
